name: Glazed Ceramic Bud Vase Green - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your home decor with this Reactive Glaze Bud Vase from Threshold™. Made of ceramic, this bulbous-shaped vase is designed in a green hue to bring timeless charm to any room. It features a flared base and has a watertight construction, so you can fill the vase with fresh stems to add natural beauty to your home. Flowing glazes with shifting tones and varied surface effects are the natural result of this handcrafted ceramic vase, offering each piece naturally imperfect charm—no two vases are ever alike, celebrating the beauty of handmade tradition.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
